name: South of the Border Wraps
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup black beans, rinsed and drained
1 tablespoon fresh cilantro or parsley, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mash the black beans lightly.
2. Add salsa, chopped green onions, and minced cilantro to the mashed beans. Mix well.
3. Spread the bean mixture evenly over each tortilla.
4. Sprinkle tomato slices and shredded cheese on top of the filling.
5. Roll up the tortillas tightly, starting from one side.
6. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add butter or margarine if needed to coat the pan.
7. Place the rolled tortillas seam-side down in the skillet.
8. Cook until golden brown and crispy on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side, adding more butter if necessary for even cooking.
9. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings.
